name: tinysa-flasher
author: PhysicistJohn
description: Fail-closed standalone firmware updater for tinySA Ultra / Ultra+ ZS407

scripts.dev: npm run build:main && concurrently -k "vite" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron ."
scripts.build:main: tsup src/main/main.ts --format esm --out-dir dist/main --external electron --external serialport && tsup src/main/preload.ts --format cjs --out-dir dist/main --external electron
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.main.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.renderer.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json --noEmit
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.package:mac: npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg zip
